fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related document.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location in which the invoice line was registered.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the name of or the description of the item, general ledger account or item charge.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item, general ledger account, or item charge on the line.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the sales statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Qty. Shipped Not Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the shipped item that has been posted as shipped but that has not yet been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales order that this shipment was posted from.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used on the entry.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order that the record originates from.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line that the record originates from.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item on the sales line is a catalog item, which means it is not normally kept in inventory.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the customer has asked for the order to be delivered.

fields.name: Promised Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you have promised to deliver the order, as a result of the Order Promising function.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Outbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the time it takes to get items ready to ship from this location. The time element is used in the calculation of the delivery date as follows: Shipment Date + Outbound Warehouse Handling Time = Planned Shipment Date + Shipping Time = Planned Delivery Date.

fields.name: Planned Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned date that the shipment will be delivered at the customer's address. If the customer requests a delivery date, the program calculates whether the items will be available for delivery on this date. If the items are available, the planned delivery date will be the same as the requested delivery date. If not, the program calculates the date that the items are available for delivery and enters this date in the Planned Delivery Date field.

fields.name: Planned Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the shipment should ship from the warehouse. If the customer requests a delivery date, the program calculates the planned shipment date by subtracting the shipping time from the requested delivery date. If the customer does not request a delivery date or the requested delivery date cannot be met, the program calculates the content of this field by adding the shipment time to the shipping date.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the customer uses in their own system to refer to this sales document.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The content will be printed on sales documents.

fields.name: Appl.-from Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied from.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this sales shipment line has been posted as a corrective entry.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.
